message:
feat(tui): enhance toast notifications with progress bars and history

Phase 4c toast enhancements (br-eou3h):
- Add persistent toasts that don't auto-dismiss
- Add progress toasts with visual progress bar
- Add toast history ring buffer (last 20 dismissed)
- Add Y-offset spring animation for stack repositioning
- Add ToastAtPosition for click-to-dismiss support
- Add ToastStackHeight for layout calculations
- Add DismissAll for clearing the stack

New methods: PushPersistent, PushProgress, UpdateProgress,
History, HistoryCount, ClearHistory, ToastAtPosition,
ToastStackHeight, DismissAll

All 8 new tests pass alongside existing toast tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
